title: Starlink's New V5 Dish Heads To Tesla Cybercabs
summary: Starlink is popping up another Elon Musk project. On Monday, Tesla teased that the upcoming Cybercab will feature a built-in Starlink antenna. “High-speed internet from space for the future of autonomous vehicles,” Starlink wrote in a tweet.
